Localization.Description: A user logged in, failed to log in, or logged out of the system

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} logged out of the system on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} from host {src.host} failed to log in to the system on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} from host {src.host} logged in to the system on host {event_src.host}
